item.title: Clevta: Clevta @Clevta · 14min Lot of talk about Arizona drafting Love at 3. I still find it hard to believe they’d actually spe
item.description: Clevta @Clevta · 14min Lot of talk about Arizona drafting Love at 3. I still find it hard to believe they’d actually spend money on Allgeire and also bring back James Conner if they were keen on drafting Love. At 3 they’d know almost 100% he’d be there when they pick. Went back and between Jeanty (LV), Mostrar más 3 1 4 2 mil
